document.name: Tutu Camp LIC
document.shortDescription: Weekday summer ballet camp in Long Island City for children ages 3–8.
document.longDescription:
Tutu Camp LIC is Tutu School Long Island City’s summer ballet camp for children ages 3–8. The official camp page says campers spend their days dancing, crafting, and exploring enchanting ballet stories, and that no prior dance experience is needed.

The current official schedule lists Coppelia Camp (June 29–July 3), Swan Lake Camp (August 24–28), and Cinderella Camp (August 31–September 4). Each session is listed at $625 and runs from 9:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m. The official page also notes that campers must be potty trained.

The official site lists the location as 43-44 12th Street, Long Island City, NY 11101, with phone number 347.617.1347.

Sources: https://tutuschool.com/lic/camp/ https://tutuschool.com/lic/ https://tutuschool.com/lic/wp-content/uploads/sites/27/2025/03/hero-camp-scaled-1.jpg
document.announcementDescription: Official page lists weekday 9 a.m. to 2 p.m. ballet camp sessions in LIC.
